cli.commands.help.description: Kay willakuyta utaq qusqa subcomando(kuna)pa yanapakuyninta qillqay.
cli.commands.pack.description: Deterministic SoRLa gtpack makiypi qunakuy artefactokunata ruray, qhawariy, utaq hampiy.
cli.pack.commands.doctor.description: Rurasqa SoRLa gtpack allin kasqanta chiqaqchay.
cli.pack.commands.inspect.description: Rurasqa SoRLa gtpack deterministic JSON hina qhawariy.
cli.pack.commands.schema.description: SORX makiypi qunakuy metadata-paq deterministic JSON schemakunata lluqsichiy.
cli.pack.commands.validation_doctor.desc: Pack doctor qhawariykunawan churasqa SORX validation metadata allin kasqanta chiqaqchay.
cli.pack.commands.validation_inspect.des: Churasqa SORX validation metadata deterministic JSON hina qhawariy.

wizard.description: Esquema paqarichiy utaq kutichiy qillqakunata churay.
wizard.flow.label: Yanapakuq puriy
wizard.locale.label: Simi suyunchik
wizard.output_dir.label: Lluqsichiy qillqana
wizard.questions.agent_endpoint_default_: Akllay ñawpaq chaskiy ñanta, ruwasqa agent endpoint willaykunaman qillqasqa.
Akllay ñawpaq riesgu patata, ruwasqa agent endpoint willaykunaman qillqasqa.
Akllay mayqin urayman makiypi formatokuna ruwasqa agent endpointkunata rikunqa.
wizard.questions.agent_endpoint_ids.help: Takya IDkunata llamk'achiy, create_customer_contact utaq request_partner_followup hina.
wizard.questions.agent_endpoint_provider: Akllanalla mana rikuchina qukuq categoria, urayman agent endpoint makiypaq llamk'achisqa.
wizard.questions.agent_endpoints_enabled: Kayta atichiy agentkuna allin negocio ruwanakunata tarinankupaq, contacto ruway utaq chaskiy mañay hina.
wizard.questions.compatibility_mode.help: Qillqay imayna qatiq paquete tikray yapaq, qhipamanpas kikin puriq, utaq pakiq kasqanta.
wizard.questions.default_source.help: Akllay musuq registros ñawpaqmanta sallqa, hawa, utaq chaqrusqa semánticawan kananpaq.
wizard.questions.default_source.label: Ñawpaq registro paqarin
wizard.questions.events_enabled.help: Ruwanakuy willaykunata llamk'achisqa waqaychay event-native paquete paqarichiypaq.
wizard.questions.events_enabled.label: Ruwanakuy willaykunata atichiy
wizard.questions.external_ref_provider.h: Akllay hawa sistema maskanapaq llamk'achisqa abstracto qunakuq categoría.
wizard.questions.external_system.help: Sutichay hawa system-of-record nisqata maypichus hawa utaq chaqrusqa registros llamk'achkanku chaypi.
wizard.questions.external_system.label: Hawa sistemapa sutin
wizard.questions.include_agent_tools.hel: Emit `agent-tools.json` alongside the canonical artifact set.
wizard.questions.output_artifacts.help: Akllay mayqin artefacto archivokuna ñawpaqmanta paqarichisqa kananpaq.
wizard.questions.output_artifacts.label: Lluqsiy artefactokuna
wizard.questions.package_name.help: Llamk'achiy takyaq paquete identidadta Gitpi kawsananpaq.
wizard.questions.package_name.label: Paquetepa sutin
wizard.questions.package_version.help: Qallariy huk versiónwan mayqinchus paquetepa manifiestonwan release tags nisqakunawan tupaq.
wizard.questions.package_version.label: Paquetepa versiónnin
wizard.questions.partial_answers.help: Musuqyachiy puriykunaqa tikranapaq munasqa chaninkunallata qusqanku.
wizard.questions.partial_answers.label: Chhulla kutichiykunata saqiy
wizard.questions.projection_mode.help: Akllay ñawpaq proyección estilo paqarichisqa ñawiriy modelospaq.
wizard.questions.projection_mode.label: Proyeccionpa modo
wizard.questions.provider_hints.help: Akllana pistasqa qhipaman proveedor watayta pusayta atinman, ichaqa kunanqa mana huk proveedorta sinchita churaychu.
wizard.questions.provider_hints.label: Proveedor pistas
wizard.questions.storage_provider.help: Kay paqueteq munasqan abstracto waqaychay atiy categoría nisqata akllay.
wizard.questions.storage_provider.label: Waqaychay proveedor categoría
wizard.questions.update_mode.help: Akllay ima hina huk seguro musuqchayta ruwanki utaq llapa generado wizardpa kamachiynin ukhupi kaq contenidota musuqmanta yapaykuyta ruwanki.
wizard.questions.update_mode.label: Musuqchay modo
wizard.sections.agent_endpoints.descript: Negociopaq allin ruwanakunata willay, agentkuna urayman gateway exportkunapi tarispa mañanankupaq.
wizard.sections.agent_endpoints.title: Agent endpointkuna
wizard.sections.compatibility.descriptio: Migración compatibilidad munayta hinaspa proyección wiñay akllanakunata hap'iy.
wizard.sections.compatibility.title: Compatibilidad hinallataq wiñay
wizard.sections.events.description: Evento-nativo puriyninta hinaspa proyección qallariy akllanakunata wakichiy.
wizard.sections.events.title: Eventos hinallataq proyecciones
wizard.sections.external_sources.descrip: Willaykuna nativoschu, externoschu, utaq híbridoschu kasqanta willay hinaspa hawa pukyu referencias nisqakunata hap'iy.
wizard.sections.external_sources.title: Hawa p'uyukuna
wizard.sections.output.description: Akllay mayqin generado artefactokuna hinaspa yanapakuy lluqsichiykuna rurasqa kananpaq.
wizard.sections.output.title: Lluqsichiy munaykuna
wizard.sections.package.title: Paquete qallariy
wizard.sections.providers.description: Concreto proveedorkunaman mana wataspa proveedor atiy categorías nisqakunata nispa rikuchiy.
wizard.sections.providers.title: Proveedor munasqakuna
wizard.sections.update.description: Huk kaq SoRLa paqueteta musuqchay, generated seccionesmanta hawapi usuario qillqasqan contenidota mana qichuspa.
wizard.sections.update.title: Paquete musuqchay
